description: Letter fragment (upper left corner). In Judaeo-Arabic with the address in Arabic script on verso. Dating: 11th or 12th century. Refers to a period of 10 months and congratulations for the addressee's brother Moshe. Reused on verso for a draft in Hebrew, in a different hand, of a panegyric for a certain Ḥalfon b. Moshe.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
